tests.title: TC-069 — Recorded test case modal accepts name + URL and routes to recording flow

error.message: Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: getByText('https://xitester.com') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: getByText('https://xitester.com') resolved to 2 elements: 1) Recording session starting at https://xitester.com aka getByText('Recording session starting at') 2) https://xitester.com aka getByText('https://xitester.com', { exact: true }) Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByText('https://xitester.com')
